content:
# Ant Design - Overview

Page type: data_table
Use cases: Chinese enterprise admin, management system, operations dashboard, CRUD list
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/table/

Visual traits:
- dense
- practical
- enterprise
- component-driven
- configurable

Use when:
- Chinese enterprise admin
- management system
- operations dashboard
- CRUD list

Avoid when:
- brand landing page
- simple mobile-first list
- editorial content

AI summary: Use Ant Design Table for dense enterprise CRUD/admin data: pagination, sorting, filtering, selection, expansion, fixed columns, loading and empty states.

# Ant Design - Layout Rules

Page type: data_table
Use cases: Chinese enterprise admin, management system, operations dashboard, CRUD list
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/table/

- Use tables for structured rows and columns with management actions.
- Expose sorting, filtering, pagination, selection, expansion, and custom empty states when the data task needs them.
- Keep actions predictable and close to the row or toolbar scope they affect.

AI summary: Use Ant Design Table for dense enterprise CRUD/admin data: pagination, sorting, filtering, selection, expansion, fixed columns, loading and empty states.

# Ant Design - Component Patterns

Page type: data_table
Use cases: Chinese enterprise admin, management system, operations dashboard, CRUD list
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/table/

- table
- pagination
- selection
- sorter
- filters
- expanded row
- fixed column
- summary
- empty state

AI summary: Use Ant Design Table for dense enterprise CRUD/admin data: pagination, sorting, filtering, selection, expansion, fixed columns, loading and empty states.

# Ant Design - Interaction States

Page type: data_table
Use cases: Chinese enterprise admin, management system, operations dashboard, CRUD list
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/table/

- selected
- expanded
- loading
- empty
- sorted
- filtered
- fixed column scroll

AI summary: Use Ant Design Table for dense enterprise CRUD/admin data: pagination, sorting, filtering, selection, expansion, fixed columns, loading and empty states.

# Ant Design - Accessibility Notes

Page type: data_table
Use cases: Chinese enterprise admin, management system, operations dashboard, CRUD list
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/table/

- Preserve semantic table structure when customizing cells.
- Do not hide important actions behind hover-only behavior for keyboard users.

AI summary: Use Ant Design Table for dense enterprise CRUD/admin data: pagination, sorting, filtering, selection, expansion, fixed columns, loading and empty states.

# Ant Design - Implementation Hints

Page type: data_table
Use cases: Chinese enterprise admin, management system, operations dashboard, CRUD list
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/table/

- Use as a strong default for React enterprise admin pages in Chinese product contexts.
- Prefer Ant table when speed and convention matter more than bespoke visual branding.

AI summary: Use Ant Design Table for dense enterprise CRUD/admin data: pagination, sorting, filtering, selection, expansion, fixed columns, loading and empty states.
